blended.narrative: Sundown Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light drizzle, highs of 44°F, winds around 22 mph.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 26°F, winds around 24 mph. Expect powder.
